message:
Running command: # Good - no CTS warnings in the partial run (it was stopped at JsonHeader).
# Now launch the full flow as a nohup background process
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

nohup librelane \
    --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
    --pdk sky130A \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v2 \
    --last-run \
    config.json \
    > /tmp/pnr_v2_full.log 2>&1 &

PNR_PID=$!
echo "LibreLane PID: $PNR_PID"
echo $PNR_PID > /tmp/pnr_v2_full.pid
sleep 8
ps -p $PNR_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
tail -10 /tmp/pnr_v2_full.log
